raw_cv_text:
Milton Uati
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: milton.uati@outlook.com | LinkedIn: milton-uati | GitHub: MiltonUati | https://miltonuati.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | Bachelor of Arts in Computer Science 2021-2024
Achieved First Class Honours with 89% average in core CS modules including Algorithms, Distributed Systems, and
Machine Learning
Led university coding club with 150+ active members, organizing weekly workshops and 4 annual hackathons
Georgia Institute of Technology | Summer Research Exchange - Full Stack Development June 2023 - August 2023
Completed intensive 12-week program building scalable web applications with mentorship from senior engineers
Contributed to 3 open-source projects with 25+ merged pull requests across distributed repositories
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Software Engineer Intern June 2023 - September 2023
Developed and deployed 4 new payment processing features in TypeScript, reducing transaction latency by 18% for
50,000+ merchants
Built comprehensive unit and integration test suite achieving 92% code coverage, preventing 12+ production bugs
Optimized database queries using indexed lookups and query refactoring, improving API response time by 340ms (24%
improvement)
Datadog | Junior Software Engineer September 2023 - Present
Engineered real-time monitoring dashboard component in React that processes 2M+ data points daily, serving 15,000
enterprise customers
Reduced cold start latency of Lambda functions by 42% through performance profiling and code optimization across 8
services
Delivered 6 bug fixes and feature improvements in first quarter, achieving 98% uptime on assigned microservices
handling 500K requests/hour
TechStartup Labs | Full Stack Developer (Contract) January 2024 - March 2024
Architected and shipped full-stack e-commerce platform using Node.js and React, generating $125K in first month
revenue
Implemented JWT-based authentication system processing 50K+ daily active users with 99.95% uptime
Collaborated with 3 cross-functional team members to deliver MVP 2 weeks ahead of schedule, resulting in Series A
funding of $2.5M
PROJECTS
CloudSync Pro | Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS S3 October 2023 - December 2023
Built intelligent file synchronization tool that syncs 10,000+ files 60% faster than competitors through delta compression
algorithms
Achieved 4.8-star rating on GitHub with 340+ stars and 2,100+ downloads across npm and PyPI
NeuroFlow Analytics | JavaScript, D3.js, Node.js, MongoDB, WebSocket July 2023 - September 2023
Developed real-time data visualization platform processing 50K events/second with sub-100ms latency using WebSocket
streaming
Generated 12 enterprise leads through product showcase, resulting in $45K ARR from SMB customers
CodeReview AI | Python, TensorFlow, FastAPI, GitHub API, Hugging Face April 2024 - Present
Created AI-powered code review assistant reducing review time by 35% for development teams through automated
pattern recognition
Integrated with 8 major git platforms, supporting 500+ developers across 40 organizations
LocalGather | React Native, Firebase, Google Maps API, Redux November 2023 - January 2024
Engineered mobile social discovery app connecting 3,200+ users within 3 months of launch in London market
Optimized app performance reducing bundle size by 45%, improving Android startup time from 4.2s to 2.3s
MetricsFlow | Go, Prometheus, Grafana, InfluxDB, Docker Compose February 2024 - March 2024
Built distributed metrics collection framework handling 1M+ data points/minute with 99.9% reliability
Achieved 89% memory efficiency improvement through custom time-series compression, reducing infrastructure costs by
$8K/month
EXTRACURRICULAR
Hack the Burgh | Technical Organizer & Mentor 2023 - Present
Organized annual hackathon attracting 400+ developers, securing £50K in sponsorships from 12 tech companies
Mentored 25+ junior developers on full-stack development, contributing to 8 award-winning projects at events
Open Source Contributions | Active Contributor 2023 - Present
Contributed 45+ pull requests to 15+ repositories including TensorFlow, Kubernetes, and Next.js with 98% merge
acceptance rate
Recognized as top contributor in Q4 2023, achieving 120+ GitHub followers and 5.2K+ profile stars
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, Java, SQL, HTML/CSS
Technologies – React, Node.js, FastAPI, React Native, Firebase, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (S3,
Lambda, EC2), GCP
Tools – Git, GitHub, VS Code, Postman, Figma, Jira, DataDog, Prometheus, Grafana, Linux/Unix
